title: Chinese-Style Toasted Tomatoes
description: A simple Chinese-inspired appetizer or snack made by topping toasted bread with sautéed tomatoes.
instructions: 1. Preheat a pan over medium heat.
2. Slice the Portuguese bread into 1-inch thick slices.
3. Toast the bread slices for 2-3 minutes or until lightly browned.
4. In a separate pan, heat the Ravenous oil over medium heat.
5. Add the sliced tomatoes to the pan and cook for 3-4 minutes or until they start to soften.
6. Add the sugar and salt to the pan and stir to combine.
7. Place the toasted bread slices on a plate and top with the sautéed tomatoes.
